notes:
I have been able to play Cyberpunk 2077 on linux before. Recently the game started flatlining and I've tried pretty much everything I can think of but I'm unable to start the game. 

So if you're looking for "install and play" experience, this isn't it anymore. It used to be. Given the time it has already taken me to troubleshoot this issue, I'm now going to uninstall the game and try again later.
title: Cyberpunk 2077

notes: The game works great and runs without any tweaks.

notes: Tried on 3 machines, all AMD all of them ( 1 -  5950X, 6800XT, 2 - 5900HX , 6800M, 3 - 4600H , 5500M). Tried all possible Audio fixes. The game simply flatlines. CDPR needs to take a serious look at this issue as it makes the game unplayable on Linux (at least on Pipewire). Hopefully the next patch will have a fix for this.
